response.justification: Bogdan Szabo lacks the mandatory C++ development experience on the Windows platform, with over 10 years focused on Node.js, TypeScript, D, Java, and other languages. His domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income is not demonstrated, and SQL experience is present but not aligned with SQL Server/Oracle as required. While his communication skills and software craftsmanship are evident, the core technical and domain requirements are not met.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with a focus on testable, high-quality code
Experience with SQL and database management
Excellent communication skills and experience in large-scale systems
concerns: No demonstrated C++ experience on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
Lacks capital markets or fixed income domain expertise
SQL experience does not align with SQL Server/Oracle as required
